---
title: "Weekly Strategy Report — YYYY-Www"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath("../.."))  # adjust if needed

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

RESULTS_DIR = "../../results/YYYY-MM-DD"  # point to the dated results folder
```

## Market Overview

> Brief qualitative summary of BTC this week — trend, key levels, notable events.

```{python}
# Load price data and show weekly summary stats
df = pd.read_csv("../../data/org/marketdata/BTCUSDT_15m_2000-11-21 00:00:00_2026-02-23 00:00:00.csv", index_col=0)
df["open_time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["open_time"])
week = df.tail(672)  # ~1 week of 15m candles

print(f"Open:  ${week['close_price'].iloc[0]:,.2f}")
print(f"Close: ${week['close_price'].iloc[-1]:,.2f}")
print(f"High:  ${week['close_price'].max():,.2f}")
print(f"Low:   ${week['close_price'].min():,.2f}")
print(f"Change: {(week['close_price'].iloc[-1] / week['close_price'].iloc[0] - 1) * 100:.2f}%")
```

## Strategy Performance

```{python}
from IPython.display import Image
Image(filename=f"{RESULTS_DIR}/portfolio_over_time.png")
```

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Total Return | |
| Annualized Return | |
| Sharpe Ratio | |
| Max Drawdown | |
| Win Rate | |
| # Trades | |

## Trade Log

```{python}
trades = pd.read_csv(f"{RESULTS_DIR}/trade_history.csv")
trades
```

## Grid Search Insights

```{python}
# grid = pd.read_csv(f"{RESULTS_DIR}/grid_search.csv")
# grid.head(10)
```

> Which param region ranked highest? Did it shift vs last week?

## Notes & Observations

-
-
-

## Next Steps

- [ ]
- [ ]
